era: Experimental Hip-Hop. E=7 -- only the second E=7 in the engine (first: These Arms Are Snakes, 125). E=6 streak breaks UPWARD. Genre-refusing. Rainier Valley. v1.49.315.

location.formative: Rainier Valley -- South Seattle. Diverse, underserved, raw. Street-level intensity. Third hip-hop neighborhood in engine.
location.career: DoNormaal. Experimental hip-hop. Self-released. Rainier Valley, Seattle. 2010s-present.

members.name: DoNormaal
members.note: Rainier Valley. Experimental hip-hop. Genre-refusing. E=7 intensity. Self-released.

theory_nodes.concept: E=7 -- experimental intensity. Qualitatively different from E=6. Genre-refusing. Unpredictable. Confrontational. Only the second E=7 in the engine (These Arms Are Snakes at 125 was first). The E=6 streak breaks UPWARD.
examples: These Arms Are Snakes (125): E=7 through physical intensity.
Unpredictable vocal delivery: spoken word, shouting, singing, whispering, abstraction.
Genre-refusing: hip-hop + industrial + noise + punk + electronic + avant-garde.
theory_nodes.description: E=7. Second ever. Experimental intensity. Qualitatively beyond E=6.

genealogy.relationship: DoNormaal at 175. Second E=7. Fifty degrees after the first.

theory_nodes.concept: E=6 streak analysis (161-174) -- fourteen consecutive degrees at maximum energy. Breaks UPWARD to E=7 at 175. The streak was building, not depleting. Energy accumulates.
examples: Fourteen modes: collective > emotional > street > aggressive > lyrical > hunger > joyful > identity > cinematic > visionary > noise > persistence > solo emergence > hustle.
Streak breaks at 175 -- not down to E=5, but up to E=7.
The streak was accumulating energy, not expending it.
theory_nodes.description: E=6 streak breaks upward. Fourteen degrees of accumulation. Energy builds.

genealogy.relationship: DoNormaal at 175. The streak breaks upward.

theory_nodes.concept: Experimental hip-hop progression -- Shabazz Palaces (157) within hip-hop > Knife Knights (171) noise on hip-hop > DoNormaal (175) art transcending hip-hop. Each step further from convention.
examples: Shabazz Palaces (157): experimental within hip-hop structure.
Knife Knights (171): noise-experimental ON TOP of hip-hop.
theory_nodes.description: Experimental hip-hop progression. Three steps from convention to transcendence.

cross_references.relationship: E=7 PAIR! Only two E=7 degrees in the engine. Post-hardcore intensity (125) vs experimental hip-hop intensity (175). Fifty degrees apart. Different genres, same qualitative leap.
EXPERIMENTAL ARC! Noise-experimental (171) to genre-refusing (175). The experimental hip-hop progression deepens.
EXPERIMENTAL LINEAGE! Afrofuturist within hip-hop (157) to art transcending hip-hop (175). Convention to transcendence.
NEIGHBORHOOD CONTRAST! Ballard hustle E=6 (174) vs Rainier Valley intensity E=7 (175). Consecutive degrees. The streak breaks upward.
